examples.name: Add SharePoint Supplier List Item
examples.description: Uses a configured SharePoint OAuth/HTTP connection to create a new item in a SharePoint Supplier List through Microsoft Graph and returns the created item ID.

connections.desc: SharePoint OAuth connection used to authenticate and access the specified SharePoint site and list.

draftCodePattern.entrypoint: export async function main({ connections, params, modules }: ServiceContext)

learnedRules: Custom Service uses main, not render or execute.
DraftConfig is a JSON string containing params, connections, and outputs.
DraftCode is stored as a string and should export async function main.
Returned object keys should match configured output IDs.
Connection variables are declared in DraftConfig.connections[] and read from the runtime connections object by ID.
Authorized third-party calls should pass the configured connection object to modules.fetch(..., { connection }).
File inputs use YeeSDK file APIs.
